name: GT Golf Learning Center
address: 19110 S Ridgeland Ave, Tinley Park, IL 60477
about: GT Golf Learning Center is a year-round golf instruction facility located at Odyssey Golf Foundation Driving Range in Tinley Park, IL. The center is led by PGA Professional Gregg Tengerstrom, who offers private and semi-private lessons utilizing advanced technology such as the FlightScope X3 Launch Monitor and OnForm Video Swing Analysis. Lessons are available for both beginners and experienced golfers, with a 24-station range featuring natural grass tees and heated hitting bays for winter play. The facility also provides custom Callaway club fittings.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses premium FlightScope X3 Launch Monitor for detailed swing data
Offers year-round instruction with heated bays and video analysis
Provides custom club fitting with Callaway equipment
Flexible lesson options with group and private packages

simulator_hardware.notes: Doppler radar launch monitor with club and ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, students are expected to bring their own clubs for lessons, though club rentals and custom fittings are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, but there are no restrictions noted on bringing personal items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not applicable as this is an instruction and practice facility, not a full course simulator.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers group lessons and semi-private options that are suitable for families and juniors.
